Will Arya's impulsive temper lead to irreversible consequences, or can he still avert disaster?

programme.title: Arya - EP 4
programme.desc: Arya and Mithra's heated argument in the car spirals out of control, leading to a devastating accident. In the present day, Arya wakes up from the coma and visits Mitra's father, grappling with guilt as everyone believes Mithra caused the crash since she was the driver. Weighed down by remorse, he learns of the other driver, Suresh's death. Will he find the redemption he desperately seeks...

programme.title: Ayalaan - EP 33
programme.desc: Meet the M family! Mani, the wide-eyed father and Mages, his bossy wife, are aliens masquerading as humans on Earth, trying to comprehend and study human behavior. Their son, Maran, meets a group of lovable misfits at school while their rebellious daughter, Mangai, feels alienated being the only human in the family. Join this oddball family in Ayalaan - Out of this World on a whimsical journey of understanding the complex beings that are humans!

programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 284
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 271
programme.desc: High Strength Activated Ginkgo to Boost Your Mind and Circulation 125mg of Activated Ginkgo Biloba enhanced with Japanese Activated Technology for better absorption. It helps to boost blood circulation and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve health conditions caused by poor blood circulation.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 222
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 296
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 244
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 306
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 252
programme.desc: Nature's Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2 krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health.

programme.title: Taiwan's 1001 Stories S9 - EP 6
programme.desc: This programme introduces to viewers Taiwan's popular eateries, restaurants and its moving stories.

programme.title: National Flavours - EP 6
programme.desc: In this brand new series, savour iconic cuisine from over the world! Hosted by Belinda Lee, Joanna Dong and Darren Lim, discover the national flavours of Brazil's Feijoada, the dedication and pride Spanish have for their prized ham, the rich cultural legacies behind Hong Kong's wonton noodles and more!

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 27
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Devil-in-Law - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Mdm Ruan gleefully shows Xia Yun the video clip of Wen Li confessing that she was involved in a hit-and-run accident many years ago. Shocked by the revelation, Xia Yun has a heart attack.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 59
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Xianshu unexpectedly runs into Xiangfan and is utterly shocked. She then learns that Xiangfan was Director Min's first love and that Director Min had secretly taken him away back then without telling anyone.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 60
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) While Director Min is not watching, Xiangfan secretly takes a car to seek Chengzhen's help. Xianshu is shocked when he unexpectedly appears at home and does not dare allow Ying-en to become aware of his presence.

programme.title: Life's Perfectionists S17 - EP 17
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) This programme introduces individuals who are outstanding in their respective fields of work. Find out how the featured individuals rose to the top of their leagues based on hard work and enthusiasm.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 14
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zaiyuan is accused of killing Shunyong and gets arrested. She is later freed for lack of evidence

programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 14
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 18
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Feeling comfortable, Alexa complains about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 1
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 14
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE - EP 3
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 15
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Horang Kaya Dengan Kearifan Cinta Lokalnya
programme.desc: Maya's (Jennifer Eve) family suddenly receives a windfall, becoming wealthy and wealthy. Maya's father, wanting a comfortable new home for his family, decides to buy a luxury home. Meanwhile, Aryan (Fauzan Nasrul), a young man, has just returned to Indonesia from abroad. Upon arriving home, he is shocked to discover that his house has become Maya's family's. A dispute ensues between Aryan and Maya's family.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a country bumpkin. Dara's arrival in Jakarta was originally to find her birth mother, but instead, she met Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). Meanwhile, Eza was ordered by his grandfather to marry Dara, even though he has a very beautiful and fashionable girlfriend.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 15
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Aaa Kasian Aaa Kesengsem Sama Idolaaa
programme.desc: Vivian (Ersya Aurelia) accidentally collides with Erdin Werdrayana. Erdin turns out to be an idol adored by many women and pursued by his fans because of his good looks.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Daniel asks Siska (Ersya Aurelia) to learn how to cook because his family owns a restaurant, and his mother stipulates that his wife must be a good cook. Siska eventually enlists the help of Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex, who is a chef and owns a culinary business.

programme.title: Gara Gara Gecko No Jomblo Jomblo
programme.desc: A beautiful girl (Nabila Zavira) has a phobia of geckos. That day, a gecko fell on her, but she doesn't believe in superstition and will still go to Jakarta, even though her mother forbids it. However, upon arriving in Jakarta, the girl meets a boss (Rizky Alatas) who has a pet reptile named Gecko. From there, the girl works around while looking after Gecko. Unfortunately, when the girl looks for Gecko in the cashier's drawer, she is suspected of stealing.

programme.title: Asap Neng Sate Bau-bau Cinta
programme.desc: Bintang is willing to replace Doni to be matched for the sake of money, but Bintang (Eza Gionino) is surprised, because the girl who is matched with Doni, his boss, is Alya (Jenniver Eve), the satay seller, who has always been at odds with him. Strangely, slowly but surely, Bintang actually likes Alya because of her kindness, cheerfulness, and beauty. However, Alya still does not know that Bintang is pretending to be the one who is matched with her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 204
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pisang Ambon Buah Kecapi, I Was Born To Make You Hepi
programme.desc: Rama (El Ryan Carlen) is furious after a collision with Ira (Rayna Snova) leaves his banana stock crushed in the street. Ira is equally annoyed because her own cart is ruined, but she eventually agrees to compensate Rama on one condition: she gets to keep whatever is left of the stock to resell it herself.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 6
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

Ironically, the man who rescues and cares for her is none other than Fauzan, the fiancé she was trying to avoid.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 204
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Seumuran Memang Berkelas Tapi Brondong Lebih Menggoda
programme.desc: Nathan (Alzi Markers) approaches Jamilah (Anjani Dina) with a hidden agenda fueled by his sister, Avril. His goal is to steal Jamilah’s secret family recipe. However, as he gets closer to her, Nathan genuinely falls in love. The romance is shattered when Jamilah discovers that their entire relationship was built on a lie to steal her business secrets.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 6
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 153
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 205
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Gak Naksir Cewek Cleaning Glowing
programme.desc: Salsa’s (Soraya Rasyid) dream trip to Korea is canceled after her family suddenly goes bankrupt. To support herself, she takes a job as a cleaning service worker. At her workplace, she meets Al (Masaji Wijayanto) and El (Jeremiah Rakesh), two bickering brothers who both fall for her and start a fierce competition for her heart.

programme.title: OB CANTIK PENCABUT RASA GALAU
programme.desc: Raya's love story is often taken advantage of by her boyfriend for being too much of a pussycat.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 205
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pisang Ambon Buah Kecapi, I Was Born To Make You Hepi
programme.desc: Rama (El Ryan Carlen) is furious after a collision with Ira (Rayna Snova) leaves his banana stock crushed in the street. Ira is equally annoyed because her own cart is ruined, but she eventually agrees to compensate Rama on one condition: she gets to keep whatever is left of the stock to resell it herself.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 7
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: MODE CARI JODOH MODE ON
programme.desc: Shanice Margaretha is horrified when her parents try to arrange her marriage with Fauzan Nasrul. Determined to escape this 'old fashioned' setup, she tries to run away but gets into an accident that leaves her with amnesia. Ironically, the man who rescues and cares for her is none other than Fauzan, the fiancé she was trying to avoid.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 154
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PUTRI MASIH DI EMPANG UNTUK SETIA
programme.desc: Lastri (Amanda Salma) has always resented her sister, Putri (Yasmine Napper), believing their father loves Putri more. The rivalry intensifies when Yuda (Ridwan Ghani), an old high school friend, returns to the village. Yuda is on a mission to find a soulmate who possesses a necklace identical to his own.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 206
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Coba-Coba Cintanya Bikin Terjaga-Jaga
programme.desc: Ryan (Kevin Hillers) is a struggling single father who sells toys to survive. When a famous influencer, Rosa (Valerie Ivanka), tries to help his child cross the street, a paranoid Ryan films the encounter and accuses her of kidnapping. The video goes viral, ruining Rosa’s reputation. To save her career, Rosa’s manager orders her to get close to Ryan and convince him to clear her name.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 8
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 154
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PUTRI MASIH DI EMPANG UNTUK SETIA
programme.desc: Lastri (Amanda Salma) has always resented her sister, Putri (Yasmine Napper), believing their father loves Putri more. The rivalry intensifies when Yuda (Ridwan Ghani), an old high school friend, returns to the village. Yuda is on a mission to find a soulmate who possesses a necklace identical to his own.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 35
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 4
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 13
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 7
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 2
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 5
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 21
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 3
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 20
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sape Terer - EP 12
programme.desc: Sape Terer merupakan 'game show' yang mempertemukan artis otai dan artis baharu bersaing merebut gelaran juara setiap episod.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat - EP 5
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 38
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Mind Your Loghat - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang memartabatkan dialek, budaya dan makanan asli. Dua selebriti akan menyediakan hidangan dari kampung halaman dan mesti bercakap dengan dialek negeri mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 Raya
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi raya untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends Live - EP 3
programme.desc: Kumpulan pelawak popular, Bocey kembali beraksi dengan sketsa komedi yang menarik. Nantikan siapakah tetamu istimewa yang akan beraksi bersama mereka.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 26
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Masak Wars - EP 8
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, 5 peserta mewakili negeri masing-masing akan bertanding untuk membuktikan masakan negeri mereka yang terbaik. Dihoskan oleh Keanu Azman.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 2
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 6
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Renovate - EP 4
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 12
programme.desc: Oya menggunakan apa yang dipelajari selama ini untuk membantu seorang pakcik yang cedera. Baby berkelakuan ganjil apabila berjumpa dengan seorang pesakit yang merupakan novelis pujaannya.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Benci - EP 26
programme.desc: Semua wanita yang didekati Migo hanya untuk memenuhi keperluan pertaruhannya bersamai dengan rakan-rakan dan juga membuktikan dirinya sebagai playboy sejati.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: My Buskers - EP 4

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Coolie No. 1 (1995)
programme.desc: A clever matchmaker fools Hoshiyar Chand into thinking Raju is rich, sparking hilarious chaos as Raju pretends to be wealthy to win love and teach a lesson. Release Year: 1995 Director: David Dhawan Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Nill Battey Sannata
programme.desc: A strong-willed mother pushes her daughter to chase her dreams, guiding her through setbacks, self-doubt, and hope as their bond grows stronger through every challenge. Release Year: 2015 Director: Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari

programme.title: Silsiilay
programme.desc: Three women face heartbreak in love: one betrayed by her husband, one ignored by an ambitious lover, and one trapped with a wealthy man who feels wrong inside. Release Year: 2005 Director: Khalid Mohamed

programme.title: Taal
programme.desc: Humiliated by her ex's family, Mansi rebuilds her life with Vikrant's help, but when her former lover returns seeking forgiveness, old pain threatens her new success. Release Year: 1999 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.desc: Debika Chatterjee, an Indian woman living in Norway with her family, fights to regain custody of her children after Norwegian authorities take them away from her. Release Year: 2023 Director: Ashima Chibber

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: Blood VS. Duty
programme.desc: This action drama series pits government agents against a tight-knit fishing community in a high-stakes battle over illegal firearms.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.desc: An undercover agent goes on a dangerous mission to bring down a crime ring. Fuelled by a bitter and painful past, Apollo and his allies face the gruelling task that will challenge his resolve and strength.

programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 9
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. programme.title: Des Racines Et Des Ailes - EP 4
programme.desc: Train of legend, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express, runs from Venice to Paris. After more than a century of service, the inlaid wood interiors have been preserved thanks to the exceptional skills of the craftsmen of Auvergne. A journey through the land of volcanoes, where tradition and expertise are still handed down.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Green - EP 1
programme.desc: We head to the heart of French Guiana, a territory where 97% of the land is covered by Amazonian forest. Antoine Auriol meets Philippe Lova Jah, Elvis, Mariana, Anais, Dave and Francisco, working to protect this natural treasure, and discovers the Kaw marshlands, veritable refuge for biodiversity.

programme.title: Alterrenative Voyages - EP 3
programme.desc: We head to the port of Fribourg before meeting a young couple of cheesemakers who produce Alpine gruyere and then visiting Estavayer-le-Lac and its biodiversity reserve, source of green energy.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 10
programme.desc: Given the national emergency, Rivard is informed about the state of the dams. Stephane is staying with Karine, who is increasingly in love with him. Following a misunderstanding, Boudreau is intercepted by a CIA agent.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagiya Tamil Magan
programme.desc: Guru is an MBA student who is diagnosed with ESP. Since his vision significantly improves, he runs away to Mumbai, but things take an unexpected turn when he sees his lookalike stab his girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie - Vellai Yaanai
programme.desc: Vellai is a farmer from an economically self-sufficient village. But when he and the villagers take a bank's crop loan, they get caught in debt due to drought and low prices for crops. A few desperate farmers migrate to the city in search of a job. Can they pay off their debt?

programme.title: Movie - Maalai Pozhuthin Mayakathilaey
programme.desc: A real-time playout of events at a coffee shop over nearly two hours on a rainy evening. A married couple fight over the lack of romance in their lives, while it blossoms between two strangers just a table away.

programme.title: Movie - Mahan Kanakku
programme.desc: Jeeva's brother-in-law is harassed by bank officials despite having paid off all loans. When he finally commits suicide, Jeeva takes advantage of the loopholes in banking to teach them a lesson.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Uyarntha Ullam
programme.desc: Anand, a wealthy man, spends his time drinking, gambling and entertaining his friends. When he meets Geetha, a young woman, he is smitten by her and decides to mend his ways.

programme.title: Movie - Dhinandhorum
programme.desc: Dhinamdhorum is a Tamil film directed by Nagaraj. The film features Murali and Suvalakshmi in the lead roles, while Manivannan and Renuka play other supporting roles. The film, which has music by Oviyan, was released in February 1998.

programme.title: Movie - Amaidhi Padai
programme.desc: A homeless pauper, Amavasai works his way up to become a corrupt politician. However, his illegitimate son, a policeman, decides to destroy Amavasai for cheating his mother.

programme.title: Movie - Veettoda Maapillai
programme.desc: A hardworking man who has three daughters owns and manages a restaurant. Impressed by the sincerity of his newly-appointed hotel manager, he decides to get his youngest daughter married to him, but the other two sons-in-law do not like him.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Goundar
programme.desc: The village head is a man who sticks to honesty while making judgements. However, when he falls prey to a conspiracy, he bravely fights to ensure that justice prevails in his village.

programme.title: Movie - Mahesh Babu No 1
programme.desc: A rock star who suffers from a mental disorder due to his bitter past is convinced that his parents were murdered by three men. Taking the support of a journalist, he sets out to find the evil men.

programme.title: Movie - Maharani
programme.desc: A young man marries a beautiful woman but never tells her about his former girlfriend. As the couple settles into matrimony, his ex-lover makes a shocking return and complicates their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Maharantham
programme.desc: Shankar, who loves Kalpana, promises a dying father that he will marry his terminally ill daughter Geeta. He marries them both. His devotion towards Geeta causes trouble between him and Kalpana.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Andavan Kattalai
programme.desc: Gandhi uses a fake spouse name, Karmeghakuzhali, to apply for a passport to fly to London. However, he feels guilty over his actions and tries to find a girl with the same name to solve his problem.

programme.title: Movie - Naai Sekar Returns
programme.desc: Naai Sekar abducts dogs in order to extract huge ransoms from their owners. However, chaos ensues when he kidnaps a dog that belongs to Dass, a notorious kidnapper.

programme.title: Movie - Kutti
programme.desc: Kutty, a kind young man, falls in love with Geeta, but she does not reciprocate his love. He continues to love her even after learning that she is in love with Arjun, her college-mate.

programme.title: Movie - Kathakali
programme.desc: Amudhavel returns to India from the USA to marry his girlfriend. During his stay, gangster Thamba gets killed and all suspicions fall on Amudhavel as he had friction with the goon in the past.

programme.title: Movie - Rajavamsam
programme.desc: When an IT team lead, Kannan, bags a project with a tight deadline and intense rivalry, he's also pressured by his large family to tie the knot. To get them off his back, he takes home a colleague Gayathri to pose as his girlfriend, but ends up marrying her.

programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 25
programme.desc: Ahead of the first North London derby of the season, we sit down with the man who made one of most controversial transfers in World football; Sol Campbell. He opens up about his decision to leave Tottenham for their fiercest rivals, Arsenal, the intense pressure of returning to White Hart Lane that first season, and how he's dealt with the fallout ever since. A fascinating insight into the 'move that shook North London'.

programme.title: THE WEEKEND WRAP - SUN 24 MAY
programme.desc: The Weekend Wrap features comprehensive match highlights, the best post-match reaction and expert analysis from a high-class team of pundits.

programme.title: FS MMA Phil De Fries vs. Szymon Bajor
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 84 in Gdynia, Poland with the main event where Phil De Fries looks for his ninth consecutive title defense against challenger Szymon Bajor.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Shane Mosley vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights 'Sugar' Shane Mosley (43-4, 37 KOs) and Luis Collazo (27-2, 13 KOs) fighting over the interim WBC title. This fight took place at the Mandalay Bay Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA, on February 10, 2007.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tokyo Grand Slam where the home nation is looking to dominate as they fielded 7 of Japan's 8 world champions. Plus we catch up with Japan's brother and sister superstars, the Abe's.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Andre Berto defending the WBC welterweight title against former WBA champion Luis Collazo. Each fighter had their own share of getting stunned throughout the bout, and the judges' decision at the end will have some controversy. Also on the card, kickboxing takes center stage as super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita takes on Gokhan Saki.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 1 features Kotoshoho, Terunofuji, Hokutofuji and Tochinoshin.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Amir Mansour vs. Fred Kassi
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features a Heavyweight bout between an once-beaten Amir Mansour and big-hitting Fred Kassi, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 3 of 4.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Shane Mosley vs. Manuel Gomez

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Jhonny Gonzalez vs Gerry Penalosa

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.desc: Everyone has come to the lake to go boating, Miss Rabbit has all sorts of boats for hire. All the families have a race and Daddy Pig wishes he hadn't picked a boat which has to be peddled.

programme.desc: While enjoying a tea break, Mr Bull accidentally breaks his delicate teapot. He takes the pieces to Miss Rabbit in the hope that she can mend it.

programme.desc: It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice, to make him big and strong. Roar!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S6 - EP 620
programme.desc: George is finding it difficult to keep hold of his big balloon. Can anyone stop it from flying off to the moon?

programme.title: Peppa Pig S6 - EP 616
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy have nothing to do, and are bored. Daddy Pig finds them an old box of garden games to play with. But not all the games are easy for little George.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 204
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S4 - EP 415
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion! But when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to find the sunstone and restore Roarian's powers!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S1 - EP 122
programme.desc: Skye and Rocky go on their first camping trip, but when Chickaletta gets caught in a crevice, they have to call in the PAW Patrol. // Tons of baby turtles start to pop up all over town and it's up to Ryder and the Pups to get them back to their pond.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S5 - EP 515
programme.desc: Rocky must rescue himself when he has been stranded on an Island full of trash by Humdinger.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 119
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 120
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 304
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show. // Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 305
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find Dora's lost birthday cake and the family throws her a surprise birthday party! // Dora and Boots help La Luna find the Luna Lily so everyone can enjoy the Moonlight Fiesta.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 124
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 125
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 126
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.desc: Uncover the dark secrets of an island off Penang, a mysterious colonial castle and a prehistoric human settlement in Perak.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: In Boston, a 25-foot tidal wave of...molasses? A dancing plague that kills 100 people? A surgery with a 300% mortality rate? We search the globe for the strangest and most bizarre deaths on record.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: The underbelly of science has never lurked as prominently as when it was harnessed for state-sanctioned 'research'. In newly published records, discover Stalin's trials to create a hybrid human-ape army.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 6
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 7
programme.desc: Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years. Willie Edwards and his son Little Willie head to an isolated body of water to chase a behemoth that's causing trouble.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: From a Revolutionary War-era ship hiding under Manhattan to a sprawling Roman villa unearthed in the backyard of a home. The structures uncovered in this episode lead to more questions than answers.

programme.title: Alone (S11) - EP 8
programme.desc: With new weather patterns looming, the days are numbered for those counting on foraging to pull them through. One survivalist is left confused as the Arctic takes back its gift.

programme.title: Haze Hell Over Asia
programme.desc: As forest fires in Indonesia spread noxious smoke across the region, politicians and scientists must join forces to defeat one of Asia's worst environmental disasters.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 34
programme.desc: Before chicken wings were America's favourite Sunday football snack, they were considered an undesirable cut of meat until two restaurateurs in Buffalo, New York, reinvented the way wings are cooked.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 35
programme.desc: A Georgia diner owner discovers the chicken game when he creates a unique fried chicken sandwich with cast-off filets. The sandwich becomes the menu centrepiece at one of the most popular fast food chains.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: For centuries archaeologists have been obsessed with locating ancient cities lost to time. How does a once-thriving community become a lost city? And if they are found, what secrets they might reveal?

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Throughout history, many have claimed to be able to see into the future and changed the course of history. But what did their prophecies reveal? And what predictions did they make for the future?

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Young adults learn the hard way that their actions have consequences. Three young men exploring abandoned buildings get charged with felony burglary.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8) - EP 18
programme.desc: Historical Bucks County, is alarmed when several young men vanish one after the other within a week. Detectives unearth a ruthless murder spree in this seemingly picture-perfect farming community.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 5
programme.desc: Detectives gather crucial information about a double-homicide from neighbourhood surveillance footage, but they're not able to identify and track the killer until some key digital data is uncovered.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 2
programme.desc: ATF Special Agents Dobyns and Kilday put their best feet forward only to have their lives put on the line. Once the investigation wraps, will they become targets for revenge?

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a woman, who was allegedly gunned down by her neighbour after an argument over cats and dogs.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Det. Nick Davis investigates a homicide in the French Quarter after an innocent bystander is shot and killed. With minimal evidence at the crime scene, Det. Davis tracks a car seen fleeing Bourbon Street.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a 911 call about cold fries leads to an arrest for murder; a fugitive is caught on the toilet; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man drives through a store hours after having trashed it; a Florida neighbourhood falls victim to shocking deliveries; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 3
programme.desc: Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 10
programme.desc: A vibrant, social media savvy, 15-year-old girl goes missing in a small town, leaving the community perplexed to what happened.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 9
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 164
programme.desc: A judge sounds off on a mother charged with assaulting her own daughter; a man convicted of robbery becomes physically ill after downing a mystery drink; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 165
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A handcuffed defendant attempts a bold escape from the courtroom; a judge gets cursed at when an arraignment goes off the rails; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 112
programme.desc: Tulsa detectives investigate how a young rapper was found shot dead on the street of an affluent suburban neighbourhood. The defence accuses the prosecution's key eyewitness of pulling the trigger.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: After police respond to a shooting in Chicago, a man is arrested and charged. He claims that he was attacked with a hammer before reaching for his weapon.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 121
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 108
programme.desc: When three people are gunned down in a Tulsa home, detectives face two suspects, and a web of lies. Prosecutors are left with circumstantial evidence to clinch the case against a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Tanya Kach Story With Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: In a revealing conversation, Tanya recounts the horror of the 10 years she spent in captivity in her predator's bedroom, and confides in Elizabeth about the realities of grooming.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 4
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 1
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 2
programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 1
programme.desc: Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S4) - EP 5
programme.desc: A mother of four is accused of killing her 11-week-old baby and is now facing life in prison. The prosecution alleges the infant was violently shaken-but the defence insists this isn't what happened.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 1
programme.desc: Tim suffers from feelings of abandonment and hoarding cars and parts is how he copes. Shortly after Tim and DeeDee married, they lost their home in a fire. After moving to a new home, Tim's hoarding began.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 2
programme.desc: Once they moved into their new home, Tim's hoarding began and continued for years. Now, DeeDee refuses to return home to the mess, and they face the possibility of divorce if he doesn't clean up his hoard.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 3
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 4
programme.desc: A frightening assault ends in tragedy when teenagers shoot splat ball guns at two brothers playing a nighttime basketball game. A fight ensues between the youths, leaving a 17-year-old dead at the scene.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Steve returns home to the Atlantic waters of the British Isles as he considers the question of what humanity can do to ensure the enduring future of whales, which have already survived so much.

programme.title: Sue Perkins' Big Adventure: Paris to Istanbul (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: In Salzburg, Sue becomes a yodelling YouTuber and does yoga with alpacas. In Vienna, she waltzes, goes hot rod racing and has the fattiest dumplings in the world.

programme.title: Ancient Powers (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: The ancient powers must get rich by trading their treasures and monetising their assets. Who will succeed in the world of commerce?

programme.title: Food Factory (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: A single sturgeon can produce a bowl of sustainable caviar worth $12,000; a shepherd's pie puts a modern twist on Mom's classic recipe; a family business rolls out nine million risotto balls every year; and discover the secret to making decadent ice wine truffles.

programme.title: Trailblazers: A Rocky Mountain Road Trip (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Ruby Wax, Mel B and Emily Atack travel off-road through Utah and trek the mountains of Aspen as they investigate the meaning of the American Dream.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Simon Reeve voyages across the Coral Triangle, a remote wilderness of tropical reefs and jungle-clad islands described as the Amazon of the seas.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and enjoying the coastal lifestyle. Now they have decided to turn their ocean escapes into their main job.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 18
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to create a meal using ingredients from Rachael's pantry. Sara prepares a free-form crostata using a variety of vegetables.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping Of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and enjoying the coastal lifestyle. Now they have decided to turn their ocean escapes into their main job.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 18
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to create a meal using ingredients from Rachael's pantry. Sara prepares a free-form crostata using a variety of vegetables.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 58
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to cook hot honey chicken, a simple and enjoyable dish made with seasoned chicken thighs, which she serves with charred corn on the cob.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 37
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia is in Hong Kong! After exploring the culinary capital, the first challenge is a Hong Kong style Mystery Box, set on Victoria Harbour.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing. Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee in helping Ryan, whose numerous head bumps undermine his life journey.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S3) - EP 73
programme.desc: To celebrate her wedding anniversary, Rachael prepares her famous beet risotto, made with roasted beetroot, red wine, onions, ricotta salata and more.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: How She Caught A Killer
programme.desc: The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 8
programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars - no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy take on a recently raided, abandoned house, now up for sale at a very low price. A real hot mess, this eyesore is currently a raccoon den with a sagging roof and holes in the walls.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 38
programme.desc: After a demonstration from Michelin starred chef Vicky Cheng, three cooks must recreate his 'Three Ages of Daikon Radish' vegetarian dish, from memory alone, the winner claiming immunity.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: Chef Deborah brings a Filipino classic to life with her adobo baby back ribs and pancit noodles, each with a Southern twist and inspired by a chef in Atlanta. She marinates the ribs and pan-fries them.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 19
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 4
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 38

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 7
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Lance's notoriously big bump, which halted his rap dreams. Shelby has lost control of her sweet tooth, her health and the mystery bumps she has developed.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S3) - EP 74
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a classic pesto sauce using fresh basil, roasted pistachios and pine nuts, combined with pecorino and parmesan cheeses. She then cooks it "Lucca Style", with potatoes and green beans.

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, "IRL" takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something - EP 1
programme.desc: South Korean actor Kim Nam-gil embarks on a journey with his companion, Lee Sang-yoon. Their first destination is the Punch Bowl village, a place marked by the pain of the divided Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: When Theresa headlines a fundraiser to fill the Wish Room at a local center for sick children, lives are changed forever. Channeling a young girl for her grieving mom, Theresa calls the woman's family.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Rebecca, Kristy and Roy have found their next potential flip: a lakefront property with a spicy past. Weather-beaten and dated, this former vacation home is definitely lacklustre.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 39
programme.desc: It's the final cook in Hong Kong. The six cooks are split into teams, cooking street food in a traditional dai pai dong for 120 hungry locals to win immunity.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 21

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 13

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 82
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: The Heat

programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. programme.title: Rediscovering China
